description: Your model rocket has been underperforming altitude predictions due to excessive aerodynamic drag from its current 50mm blunt conical nose cone. Optimize the rocket's aerodynamics by changing the nose cone to an efficient profile (such as Ogive or Haack series) with a length of at least 120mm, ensuring the stability margin remains at or above 1.0 caliber. Save the optimized design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/optimized_nosecone_rocket.ork. Document the original and new configurations, the simulated apogee altitude, stability margin, and shape rationale in a trade study report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/nosecone_trade_study.txt.
